welcome_description: An AI-powered conversation experience that helps you find your ideal front panel and discover the quiz result that suits you best.
input_placeholder: Type a message... (Enter to send, Shift+Enter for new line)
restart_confirm: Are you sure you want to restart the conversation? All records will be cleared.
error_network: Network error, please try again later
confirm_delete_session: Are you sure you want to delete all conversations in this session? This action cannot be undone.
confirm_delete_sessions: Are you sure you want to delete {{count}} sessions? This action cannot be undone.
hciot_hero_title: Turn hospital education files into guided patient conversations.
hciot_hero_description: This interface is designed for hospital-side evaluation of education Q&A quality. Pick a topic first, then choose a specific question to start, and answers follow the current prompt rules and knowledge documents.
hciot_hero_note: The product direction is public-facing, but this stage is mainly for hospital testing. Adjust tone, restrictions, and response format through prompt settings.
hciot_topic_subheading: Pick a topic, then a question
hciot_input_placeholder: Ask about symptoms, self-care, diet advice, medication reminders, or follow-up timing...
hciot_store_missing_notice: Store {{store}} was not found. Please create the store and upload the education documents first.
hciot_language_confirm_zh: Switching language will restart the conversation. Continue?
hciot_language_confirm_en: Switching language will restart the conversation. Continue?
